kickCounter.title: Track Your Baby's Movements
kickCounter.subtitle: Monitor your baby's kicks and movements throughout your pregnancy. Keep track of patterns and stay connected with your little one.
kickCounter.loginPrompt: Please log in to use the Kick Counter.

landing.readyDesc: Find a comfortable position and start a new kick-counting session. We'll help you track every movement.
landing.trackingTipText: The best time to count kicks is after meals or when lying on your side. Aim to feel at least 10 movements within 2 hours.

session.title: Kick Session
session.empty: No movements recorded yet. Tap a button above when you feel a kick.

stats.title: Kick Counter Statistics
stats.subtitle: Track your baby's movement patterns over time
stats.weeklyKickCountDes: Number of kicks recorded each day this week

contractionCounter.title: Time Your Contractions
contractionCounter.subtitle: Track the duration and frequency of your contractions and know when it's time to head to the hospital.
contractionCounter.loginPrompt: Please log in to use the Contraction Counter.
contractionCounter.readyDesc: Start a new session when your contractions begin. We'll time each one and track the intervals for you.

counter.tip1: Track from the start of one contraction to the start of the next
counter.tip2: Note the duration of each contraction
counter.tip4: Your baby is most active in the evening
counter.tip5: Kick count is consistent and healthy

stats.title: Contraction Statistics
stats.subtitle: Monitor your contraction patterns and trends over time
stats.dailyCountDes: Number of contractions recorded each day

history.title: Session History
history.subtitle: Review all your past contraction-tracking sessions
